case_title: MEREDITH, ROGER L. vs. CLAYTON, ALGERINE

docket_entries.description: MOTION /PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEREDITH, ROGER L. HEARING SET FOR DEC-20-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
